layout.title: Veerify - Feedback that matters
layout.description: Veerify - Collect feedback that actually matters. The modern feedback management platform for product teams.
layout.ogDescription: Collect, organize, and act on user feedback. Always know what to build next.

hero.subtext: Veerify helps product teams collect, prioritize, and act on user feedback - so you always build the right thing next.

features.intro: A focused toolkit for collecting signal, removing noise, and shipping what users actually care about.

0.title: Feedback Collection
0.desc: Embed a widget anywhere or share a public link. Capture ideas, bugs, and feature requests from users in context.

1.title: Voting & Prioritization
1.desc: Let users vote on what matters most. Automatically surface your highest-impact opportunities and drop the noise.

2.title: Public Roadmap
2.desc: Show users where you're headed. Build trust by publishing your roadmap and closing the feedback loop automatically.

3.title: Team Workflows
3.desc: Organize feedback by project, assign owners, and track status across your team - all in a single place.

4.title: Insights & Reports
4.desc: Understand trends over time. See which themes surface repeatedly and make confident decisions with real data.

5.title: Auto Notifications
5.desc: Close the loop automatically. Notify users the moment their requested feature ships so nothing falls through.

0.title: Collect
0.desc: Add Veerify to your app in minutes or share a public link. Start receiving structured feedback from users from day one.

1.title: Prioritize
1.desc: Users vote, you decide. A clear signal-to-noise ratio means you always know what to build next - and what to skip.

2.title: Deliver
2.desc: Ship it, update your roadmap, and notify users automatically. The feedback loop closes. Trust compounds.

pricing.introTop: Veerify is in open beta. Everything is free while we shape the
pricing.priceHint: Free forever during beta. Fair pricing when we launch.

benefits.introTop: Whether you're shipping code or shaping strategy,
benefits.introBottom: Veerify works the way you do.

0.title: Full REST API access
0.description: Integrate feedback directly into your existing tools and workflows with a clean, well-documented API.

1.title: Open source & self-hostable
1.description: Inspect, fork, and contribute to the codebase. Host Veerify on your own infrastructure with complete control.

2.title: Webhooks & event streams
2.description: React to new feedback, votes, and status changes in real time via outbound webhooks to any endpoint.

3.title: No vendor lock-in
3.description: Export all your data at any time in standard formats. Your feedback belongs to you, always.

4.title: 5-minute setup
4.description: Add a feedback widget to any product with a single script tag or our lightweight npm package.

0.title: Your voice shapes the product
0.description: Submit ideas and bug reports directly to the team. Every piece of feedback is seen and considered.

1.title: Vote on what matters most
1.description: Upvote existing requests to signal priority. The most-wanted features get built first.

2.title: Transparent public roadmap
2.description: See exactly what's planned, in progress, and shipped. No more guessing what comes next.

3.title: Stay in the loop automatically
3.description: Get notified when a feature you voted for moves to "In Progress" or ships to production.

4.title: Simple and fast to use
4.description: Submit feedback in seconds - no accounts required on public boards. Just say what you need.

users.label: More features shipped with user input

cta.description: Join the teams already using Veerify to build products their users actually love.
cta.hint: No credit card required. Free during beta.

1.text: Happy to test this once available.

0.detail: Add a dark theme switch and persist user preference across sessions.

0.text: Would love this for late-night sessions.

1.name: Jonas
1.text: Please sync with system preference by default.

1.detail: Fix malformed CSV quoting that causes Safari downloads to open as invalid files.

0.name: Maya
0.text: Confirmed on Safari 17.3. Export fails every time.

1.name: Leo
1.text: A fix here would unblock our reporting flow.

2.detail: Post new feedback and status updates directly to Slack channels.

0.name: Noah
0.text: Webhook support for channel routing would be great.

1.name: Iris
1.text: We want status updates posted to #product-feedback.

3.detail: Send a monthly summary of trending feedback and recently shipped items.

0.name: Chris
0.text: A monthly summary would keep stakeholders aligned.

1.name: Nina
1.text: Include top-voted items and shipped updates please.

4.detail: Expose a secure API for enterprise sync with Jira and internal tools.

0.name: Sofia
0.text: Needed for syncing into our internal portal.

1.name: Ethan
1.text: API keys and audit logs would make this enterprise-ready.

footer.description: The feedback platform for teams who care about what they build.
